taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: API Design, Backend Services, Computer Science Fundamentals, Domain Object Modeling, ORM Technologies
skill_match_scores: API Design:1.0, Backend Services:1.0, Computer Science Fundamentals:1.0, Domain Object Modeling:0.0, ORM Technologies:0.0
must_have_quals: A BS or MS in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related field, Proven experience designing and implementing high-performance APIs and core backend services, A genuine passion for delivering quality, end-user-facing products that solve real-world problems, The ability to quickly implement, iterate, and pivot based on new ideas and customer feedback, A proactive communicator who thrives when working with designers, PMs, and fellow engineers to bridge the gap between 'possible' and 'shippable.', Excitement for taking on projects that directly improve the lives of travelers and finance teams alike, A willingness to operate and lead within a fast-paced, high-growth environment where the bar is set high
core_responsibilities: Build the Foundation: Contribute to the design and implementation of high-performance API endpoints and backend services that power our "all-in-one" travel and expense platform, Bridge Code & Data: Apply your knowledge of CS fundamentals to translate complex business logic into clean, scalable code using domain object modeling and modern ORM technologies, Learn to Scale: Collaborate with senior mentors to navigate the real-world technical trade-offs required to build distributed backend processes that support a global user base, Ship with Impact: Directly enhance the traveler experience by building and shipping innovative features that turn manual expense reporting into a seamless, "no-touch" reality, Master the Ecosystem: Gain hands-on experience across the entire development lifecycle, from architecting backend logic to ensuring the reliability of services in a production environment, Power the Mission: Join a team dedicated to "powering the people who power business" by eliminating friction at the intersection of travel and finance
job_summary: Navan is on a mission to revolutionize the corporate journey as the world's only all-in-one travel, corporate card, and expense management platform. As a Backend Engineer on the Expense team, you will be building the engine behind the world’s most seamless expense management platform while collaborating with a team to identify customer needs and build innovative solutions.
